title: Feedback - send a Other feedback without names/email
scenario: "Other" type feedback can be sent from App Settings > Feedback without providing a name or email
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or profile icon to access the side menu.
Select App Settings from the side menu.
Scroll down and tap on Feedback.
In the Feedback screen, tap on the "Other" option (if a category selector is shown).
Enter feedback text in the text input field (leave Name and Email fields blank).
expected: Feedback is sent successfully without requiring a name or email address.
